title: SQL throws TypeException if aggregations and limit statements are both present
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE agg_table(id INTEGER, value DOUBLE, category VARCHAR);
SELECT SUM(value) AS total_value FROM agg_table WHERE category = 'A' ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM agg_table GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_value DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_value FROM agg_table GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY count_value DESC LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: Aggregations with limit statements cause TypeException
